subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 692760884/221215066 is not a GRB
body:
J. Wood (NASA/MSFC) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 692760884/221215066 at 01:34:39 UT
on 15 December 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to an M-class solar flare."
